name: Grand Galemon

signature_move.name: Dragonic Storm
signature_move.description: UsesStymphalidesto unleash a wind that cuts down everything around it all at once.

description: A large Perfect Digimon renowned as King of the Forest . The armor covering it up to its wings and beak is coated with magic. It skillfully blends into its surroundings by reflecting light in a special way, and despite having large wings, it is also able to muffle sounds by flapping them. Its huge comb -like horn symbolizes it as king of the forest, and it is said that many Digimon inhabiting the forest will bow down just looking at it. The wind generated by its gunbai " Stymphalides ", which was made with wind magic, also has the role of conveying Grand Galemon's thoughts, and it ensures the safety of the forest by delivering instructions and warnings to groups of Galemon via this wind. Also, since it uses magic, it is considered to be one of the Digimon belonging to the " Vortex Warriors ", led by Medieval Dukemon . Its Special Moves are using Stymphalides to unleash a wind that cuts down everything around it all at once ( Dragonic Storm ), and flying and charging the enemy while going into a tailspin, tearing through them with its metal wings ( Wing Tornado ).
